# FarbenCRM

> The CRM your AI agent already knows how to use. Open-source, self-hosted, with native AI agent integration.

## Overview

FarbenCRM is a free, open-source, self-hosted CRM built for AI-native workflows. It ships with a full REST API, machine-readable documentation, and first-class AI agent integration so your AI agent can manage contacts, deals, tasks, and notes without any glue code.

- Website: https://your-farbencrm-instance.example.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/your-org/farbencrm
- License: MIT

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://your-farbencrm-instance.example.com): product overview, features, and signup
- [Blog](https://your-farbencrm-instance.example.com/blog): product updates and guides
- [Comparisons](https://your-farbencrm-instance.example.com/compare): how FarbenCRM compares to other CRMs

## What It Does

- **People & Companies**: manage contacts and organizations with 17 attribute types
- **Deals & Pipeline**: drag-and-drop Kanban boards with customizable stages
- **Tasks & Notes**: linked to any record with rich text editing and deadlines
- **Lists**: curated collections with list-specific custom attributes
- **Search**: full-text search across all records
- **Custom Objects**: create your own entity types beyond People, Companies, and Deals
- **AI Chat Agent**: talk to your CRM data in plain English, powered directly by Anthropic's Claude API (Sonnet 4, Opus 4, or Haiku 4.5)
- **CSV Import/Export**: bulk data import with column mapping
- **Dark & Light Mode**: full theme support

## AI agent Integration

Generate a SKILL.md and config from Settings > FarbenCRM, drop them into your AI agent's skills folder, and your agent can manage your CRM through natural language. 40+ API endpoints, bearer token auth, machine-readable docs.

## Tech Stack

Next.js 15 (App Router), TypeScript, PostgreSQL 16, Drizzle ORM, Better Auth, shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS v4, TanStack Table, dnd-kit, TipTap, Anthropic Claude API.

## API

Full REST API at `/api/v1/` with Bearer token authentication (`fc_sk_` prefix).

- Concise API reference: https://your-farbencrm-instance.example.com/llms-api.txt
- Full product + API docs: https://your-farbencrm-instance.example.com/llms-full.txt
- OpenAPI spec: https://your-farbencrm-instance.example.com/openapi.json

## Self-Hosting

Docker Compose deployment. Clone the repo, configure `.env`, run `docker compose up`. No vendor lock-in, no per-seat pricing, no data leaving your infrastructure.
